items.title: New Launcher & Auto-Patcher
items.body: Switched to a manifest-based patcher — only changed files download now. Added in-launcher game settings and live server status.

items.title: Class Balance Pass
items.body: Adjusted several 4th-job skill ratios and fixed two boss HP desyncs. Full numbers in Discord.

items.title: Stability & Drops
items.body: Server-side drop table fixes for mid-game maps and a memory leak patch on channel hop.
